name: Chocolate Cake Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature (70°F).
2. Beat the sugar and eggs together until creamy and lemon-colored.
3. Melt the butter and chocolate in a small saucepan over low heat, then beat into the sugar and egg mixture.
4. Combine the vanilla and buttermilk, stirring it into the sugar mixture.
5. In a large bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
6. Stir this dry mixture into the liquid mixture.
7. Chill the dough slightly to make it easier to handle.
8. Roll out half of the dough on a lightly floured board until about 1/2 inch thick.
9. Cut the dough into doughnut shapes.
10. Allow the cut doughnuts to dry for 10 minutes before frying.
11. Heat oil in a large skillet to 370°F.
12. Use a metal pancake turner to dip in hot oil each time before moving or turning a doughnut.
13. Transfer the doughnuts to the skillet, placing one every 15 seconds.
14. Fry each doughnut for about 90 seconds per side.
15. Remove the doughnuts and drain on paper towels.
